info.english_meaning: to woundto striketo painto irritate to hurt to cause pain to attack
info.hindI_arTa: duHKa denA pIq0A karanA GAva karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SvasatAM ca SfRomyenaM goputrARAM pratodyatAm ( =pratodyamAnAnAm)' (BA॰anu॰117.11) pratodena totreRa vyaTyamAnAnAmityarTaH
'plavaH pratudAm' (Apa॰Da॰1.17.33) tuRqena pratudya ye Bakzayanti te dArvAGAwAdayaH pratudaH praSabda AdikarmaRi pratudati todanamAraBate
'nistudyate yasya Siro'timAtram' (suSruta0 uttara0 259) nistudyate balavat pIqyate atimAtramityukte nirnirarTako Bavati
'virAwaM vitudantyete gfDragomAyuvAyasAH' (BA0 strI0 2023) vitudanti viluYcanti avalumpanti
'vi pUzannArayA tuda paRericCa hfdi priyam' (f0 6536) vituda=viDya
'SunaM suPAlA vi tudantu BUmim' (aTarva0 3175) vitudantu=viliKantu vikfzantu
'naKAgrEH kena te BIru vitunnaM hi stanAntaram' (rA0 5687) vitunnam=vikzatam

'AtodinO nitodinAvaTo santodinAvuta' (aTarva0 7953) AtodinO sarvato vyaTakO AhantArO tAqayitArO tataM vIRAdikaM vAdyamAnadDaM murajAdikam vaMSAdikaM tu suziraM kAMsyatAlAdikaM Ganam.. caturviDamidaM vAditrAtodyanAmakam (amara:)
'AtodinO nitodinAvaTo santodinAvuta' (aTarva0 71003) nitodinO nitarAM nikfzwaM vA vyaTayantO atikazwaM bADAkAriRO
'vidvezamuttudati cetasi nAsikA me' (avadA0 nA0 13) uttudati utpAdayati
'Aruhya vfkzAnnirmUlAn gajaH paritudanniva' (BA0 u0 758) pAdErmardayanniva parirujanniti pAWAntaram
